PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?winner WHERE {
  wd:Q45313604 wdt:P527 ?match .
  ?match wdt:P31 wd:Q188766 .
  ?match wdt:P2129 ?winner .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?match) , "Women's Royal Rumble"))
}
